descs.desc: [WhenUse] If attacked while shielded, gain +1 Charge Count (Max 10 per turn)
[WhenUse] If attacked while shielded, gain +2 Charge Count (Max 10 per turn)

1050601.name: Activate rrR-#4 Suit Pressurization
1050601.desc: At the end of the turn, Max Speed +2 (Capped at 6) per 5 Charge Count next turn.

1050621.name: Maneuver Training
1050621.desc: At the end of the turn, 1 ally with the highest Charge Count gains Max Speed +1 (Capped at 3) per 5 Charge Count next turn.
